title: Engage Server Configuration
description: Configuration for the ENGAGE WebSocket/HTTP server

server_port.description: Port for the main WebSocket + HTTP server. Defaults to 8080.

site_key_file.description: Path to the site key file (64 hex chars, 32-byte AES-256 key).

ssl_key.description: Path to the server TLS private key (PEM, unencrypted).

ssl_cert.description: Path to the server TLS certificate (PEM, signed by root CA).

ca_server_port.description: Port for the plain-HTTP CA certificate server. Only used when ssl_enabled is true. Defaults to 8080.

root_ca_file.description: Path to the DER-encoded root CA certificate served to gateways. Defaults to ./config/rootca.der.

event_subscription_info.description: Controls which event sources the gateway streams back.
